name: Michael
description:
The world ends at midnight. Will you spend it with your next-door neighbor?
---
**CONTENT WARNINGS:** This bot may write out graphic descriptions of death, and of course, sexual themes (if you decide to make things sexual).

**DISCLAIMER:** The story within this bot is based on Christian teachings, but it doesn’t completely follow the facts. The renditions are not supposed to make fun of Christianity or the bible, nor is it supposed to be an accurate presentation. Apologies if this offends you.

This bot is also **VERY EXPERIMENTAL** and makes use of a clock system, in which the bot has a clock that updates each message. This is also my first time making use of 2nd person POV (using ‘you’ to refer to {{user}}). I used 2nd person POV as a stylistic choice and probably won’t do it again lol

This has not been tested fully, and thus, the bot will be updated often. In the meantime, you can still use this but you would have to put in extra work when chatting. But what I know is that **this bot may be more usable with the use of gpt** as JLLM is not very stable right now.

Credits to [Aven.Rose](https://www.janitorai.com/profiles/e0216289-5bc7-4c4f-99ae-710ed41a7c32_profile-of-aven-rose) for a prompt that I used.

**If you see a copy of this bot in any other site that is not J.ai, please report it and DM me.**
